(COMPLAINT,71.) DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. TAUALA ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ELDA AGAVE, LLC, JAY NATALE MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is GRANTED. Plaintiff did not provide the Court with an adequate explanation addressing the inconsistent positions regarding the option taken in the UD action and this action, as previously addressed by the court. (Complaint,71.) Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. No opposition filed
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Continued To Apr-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2022 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO STRIKE
is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Motion is granted as to paragraphs 35-51, 60, 61, 65, 66 and 75. Plaintiff shall have 10 days to amend to explain the inconsistent position regarding the option taken in the UD action (verified complaint, opposition to defendant's motion for summary judgment) and this action, (i.e. whether option was properly exercised creating a binding agreement or not properly exercised rendering it null and void). Motion is otherwise denied. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to October 31, 2022 on Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
